details.note: Agent Diff Review component with DiffFileGroup, DiffHunk, HunkExplanation sub-components. Groups hunks by file/turn/claim/phase. Shows tool, phase, claim, risk, test coverage per hunk. One-click revert per hunk/file/group. Explain this hunk queries event ledger. SolidJS, TypeScript strict.
Added Agent Diff as a tab alongside Timeline. Tab bar at top switches between Timeline and Agent Diff views. Session list persists across tabs.
